creator: mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org
text:
Tried to mirror my root drive as per 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/geom-mirror.html

System did not recover from reboot, failing with:

GEOM: mirror/gm0: corrupt or invalid GPT detected.
GEOM: mirror/gm0: GPT rejected -- may not be recoverable

Further research shows that this is expected, and is a result of our
new GPT overlords

Fix: 

Could we get a warning at the top of the page that says "For FreeBSD 8
and earlier. Do not use on FreeBSD 9." ?

We need updated docs, yes, but a warning in the directions would
reduce user annoyance.
